import { useScrollReveal } from '../hooks/useScrollReveal'; import './About.css'; export default function About() { const ref = useScrollReveal(); return (
About me

Building things that{' '} actually matter

I'm Olatade — a full-stack developer and video editor based in Lagos, Nigeria. I've spent the last 7+ years turning ideas into products that live in the real world, from fintech platforms tackling Nigeria's cash infrastructure challenges to SaaS tools and commercial video productions.

Right now I'm building{' '} Posteering — a platform connecting people to POS operators across Nigeria with escrow-backed transactions and real-time cash intelligence. It's the kind of problem I love: technically interesting and genuinely useful.

When I'm not writing code, I'm behind a camera or an edit suite — colour grading, motion graphics, telling stories through footage. The same eye for detail that makes good software makes good video.
